items: When extracting optional list values from dictionaries, use `dict.get("key") or []` instead of `dict.get("key", [])` to handle both missing keys and explicit None values, preventing TypeError on len() calls
When enabling platform features like file upload via update_app_features, ensure the app is first registered to avoid 'app not found' errors
Use Python 3.9 compatible type hints (Union[X, Y] instead of X | Y) for broader compatibility across environments
ECharts is a reliable choice for creating adaptive distribution charts from Excel data
FastAPI sub-apps should follow the handle_chat function + router pattern for consistent platform integration
For Excel file parsing in Python, pandas with openpyxl provides robust support for .xlsx files
Adaptive distribution charts should dynamically adjust axis labels and data buckets based on the uploaded data structure
